tagline: Custom Vinyl & Gunite Pools Built for Your Backyard

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built to
Last a Lifetime
hero.subheadline: From custom vinyl and gunite pools to renovations and weekly maintenance — B&B Pools has been the Upstate's trusted pool builder since 1982. Let us bring your backyard vision to life.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Solutions From<br class="hidden md:block"> Design to Daily Care
services.subtitle: Whether you're building your first pool or refreshing one that's seen better days, B&B Pools delivers craftsmanship and care the Upstate has trusted for four decades.

cards.title: Custom Vinyl Pools
cards.description: Cost-effective and fully customizable. Choose your shape, depth, and finish — we handle everything from excavation to your first splash.

cards.title: Gunite Pool Construction
cards.description: Premium concrete pools with limitless design flexibility. Built to your exact specifications with structural integrity that lasts generations.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, new tile, updated coping, and structural upgrades that transform aging pools into modern backyard centerpieces.

cards.title: Equipment & Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — our factory-trained technicians diagnose and fix issues fast. Most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. We keep your pool swim-ready so you never worry about water quality.

cards.title: Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal pool prep done right. We handle spring startups and winterizations so your pool is protected year-round.

steps.title: Schedule a Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We'll visit your property, discuss design ideas, and provide an honest, detailed estimate — no pressure, no hidden fees.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles every phase — permits, excavation, plumbing, finishing. You'll stay informed with clear communication throughout.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your custom pool is complete and ready for family memories. We'll walk you through maintenance and remain your partner for service, repairs, and seasonal care.

about.label: Why Upstate SC Trusts B&B Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1982 — Built on Reputation, Not Advertising
about.description: Owner Jerry Bowers has been building pools in the Upstate since 1982, founding B&B Pools, Inc. in 1986. With a 12,000 sq ft retail showroom, on-site display pools, and a crew that treats every project like their own backyard, we've earned our reputation one pool at a time. Every detail matters — from the first consultation to the final walkthrough.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & Award-Winning
features.description: Fully licensed SC contractor with comprehensive insurance. Our designs have earned recognition across the Upstate pool industry.

features.title: Financing Options Available
features.description: Your dream pool doesn't have to wait. We offer flexible financing so you can start building now and pay at a pace that works for you.

features.title: Unmatched Craftsmanship Guarantee
features.description: We stand behind every pool we build. If something isn't right, we make it right — period. That commitment is why families keep referring us.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. We price fairly — no hidden costs, no change-order games.

guarantee.headline: Our Quality Promise
guarantee.description: Every B&B pool is built to last. We stand behind our materials and workmanship with industry-leading warranties. If something isn't right, we fix it — that's been our way since 1982.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pools take 6-10 weeks from breaking ground to filling water, depending on design complexity and weather. We'll give you a clear timeline during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We work with trusted lending partners to offer flexible financing options. Many homeowners are surprised at how affordable monthly payments can be for their dream pool.

faqs.question: What's the difference between vinyl and gunite pools?
faqs.answer: Vinyl pools are more budget-friendly with smooth surfaces and flexible layouts. Gunite pools offer unlimited design freedom and exceptional durability — they're the premium choice for custom shapes and features.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our maintenance and repair services are available for any pool — vinyl, gunite, or fiberglass. We're happy to keep your existing pool in top shape.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg, and surrounding Upstate South Carolina communities. If you're within about 50 miles of Pelzer, we can likely help.

testimonials.name: David T.
testimonials.text: Jerry and his crew built our gunite pool last summer and the results are stunning. They communicated every step of the way and even removed their shoes on the deck. True professionals who care about their craft.

testimonials.name: Amanda P.
testimonials.text: We shopped around for months and B&B was the clear winner — fair price, honest timeline, and they delivered exactly what they promised. Our vinyl pool is the centerpiece of our backyard now.

testimonials.name: Chris & Lauren M.
testimonials.text: Had our 20-year-old pool completely renovated — new liner, coping, and a heater upgrade. It looks better than new. B&B has maintained it weekly ever since and the water is always perfect.

contact.headline: Ready to Build Your Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free design consultation today. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed estimate — no obligation.

footer.description: B&B Pools, Inc. has been building and servicing custom pools across Upstate South Carolina since 1982. Family-owned, quality-driven, and committed to making your backyard extraordinary.
footer.service_area: Serving Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg & Upstate SC
